LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PROVE THAT INACCURATE INFORMATION WAS GIVEN AND THAT IS FATAL TO EACH OF THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT CARRIED THE BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THE PLAINTIFF DID NOT HAVE EVIDENCE TO SHOW THAT AN INACCURATE STATEMENT WAS MADE DURING THE 90 DAYS PERIOD. OBJECTIONS WERE OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: MAURA BALDOCCHI, CSR# 5207
